text: 971 b Q ® &P - <& An 204 o Leczer 2o 5 e TR BAer A 2 osaTte L a Tt F % WA SAss KA 5555 el Pt o AR ELE0 5 L300 o5 S2e B ZAS a3 - @ 285 Sop A 380 (R A3 A5 AT S0 [9:71] The believers, both men and women, are allies of one another. They enjoin good, forbid evil, establish Prayer, pay Zakah, and obey Allah and His. Messenger. Surely Allah will show mercy to them. Allah is All-Mighty, Al Wise.
